question: Show all city names and the average distance to all other cities.
sql: SELECT c1.city_name, AVG(dd.distance) AS average_distance FROM City c1 JOIN Direct_distance dd ON c1.city_code = dd.city1_code OR c1.city_code = dd.city2_code GROUP BY c1.city_code;

back_translation.intent: 计算每个城市的平均距离

semantic.reason: 语义一致。原始问题要求显示所有城市名称及其到其他城市的平均距离，SQL反向翻译描述中意图是计算每个城市的平均距离，涉及City和Direct_distance表，使用AVG聚合函数，按city_code分组，符合原始问题的语义。
